business_ideas.idea: Trends book: transcribed best founder interviews packaged as cheap PDF product

predictions.text: India startup ecosystem will produce massive companies in education and commerce
Indian middle class growth and willingness to pay for education creates billion-dollar opportunities
DTC companies will struggle and many are already dead but don't know it yet
Gap between winners and losers in DTC space will widen significantly
